dependencies.name: github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2
dependencies.reason: HTTP framework — middleware chain, context methods, error handling, route matching used in all API handlers

dependencies.name: gorm.io/gorm
dependencies.reason: ORM — query building, preloading, transactions, migration patterns (injected *gorm.DB everywhere)

dependencies.name: github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go
dependencies.reason: MCP protocol Go SDK — tool definitions, protocol messages, transport for agent server
